<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework; use function sprintf; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final class ComparisonMethodDoesNotAcceptParameterTypeException extends Exception { public function __construct(string $className, string $methodName, string $type) { parent::__construct( sprintf( '%s is not an accepted argument type for comparison method %s::%s().', $type, $className, $methodName, ), ); } }
